source: Northrop Grumman / Intelsat press release 2021-04-12

source: Widely reported 'zombiesat' event, command loss 2010-04-05

source: Inferred from signature: -0.047 deg inclination correction with near-zero altitude change; no per-maneuver disclosure exists
